About

Systems thinker.
Builder by trade.

I build infrastructure, products, and organizations that operate at the edge of established categories. My work spans manufacturing operations, media production, platform engineering, and AI-driven data intelligence — often simultaneously.

At Gold Shore Labs, I'm developing a suite of interconnected products: an AI gateway and Proof of Agency layer (Banproof), a sentiment intelligence platform, and tools for human-in-the-loop AI workflows. The common thread is building systems that remain intelligible and auditable as they scale.

Before software, I spent years in industrial and manufacturing contexts — Fabco Industries, print and media production — which shapes how I think about reliability, throughput, and the cost of failure in production systems.

Current focus
Gold Shore Labs — AI infrastructure, data sentiment, human-in-the-loop platforms
Approach
Composable systems. Auditable state. Minimal surface, maximum leverage.
Background
Manufacturing · Media · Platform engineering · Operations · Applied AI
Location
New York City

Selected work

Active ventures &
recent projects

AI Infrastructure · 2024–present

Gold Shore Labs

Founder-led product studio building AI gateway infrastructure, sentiment intelligence tooling, and human-in-the-loop workflow systems. Platform serves multi-tenant data routing across sports, government, and professional network verticals.

goldshore.ai →

AI Gateway · Proof of Agency

Banproof

AI transparency layer implementing Proof of Agency (PoA) protocols. Provides auditable records of AI decision chains and DePIN infrastructure for verifiable AI action provenance.

banproof.me →

Patented Product · Client work

Armsway

Patented client product. Selective access — inquire directly for details.

armsway.com →

AI Video · Creative

Wayward Traveler

AI video production project utilizing Google Veo. Experimental long-form narrative generation at the boundary of documentary and synthetic media.

Operations · Food systems

SOLEFOODNY

New York food systems project. Operations and platform infrastructure.

In development

Additional ventures in development. Not yet public.

Career

Background &
experience

2024 – Present

Founder

Gold Shore Labs

Building AI infrastructure products, sentiment intelligence platforms, and human-in-the-loop workflow tooling. Full-stack architecture across Cloudflare Workers, D1, R2, and multi-model AI APIs.

Fabco Industries

Industrial operations, production systems, and manufacturing process management. Foundation for systems-level thinking applied to software infrastructure.

Contact

Work together.
Or just say hello.

I take on a small number of engagements. If what you're building has real stakes and unusual constraints, I'm interested in hearing about it.
